full_text:
Hu (Wencai)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu, styledWencai. Asked to reassure Li Jue but he disliked Wang Yun, took his men and left. Hu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
